content.code: void value; // won't work, variables can't be defined with incomplete type void
error C2562: 'noReturn': 'void' function returning a value

content.text: Best practiceUse an empty parameter list instead ofvoidto indicate that a function has no parameters.
Use an empty parameter list instead ofvoidto indicate that a function has no parameters.

Other uses of voidThe void keyword has a third (more advanced) use in C++ that we cover in section19.5 -- Void pointers. Since we haven’t covered what a pointer is yet, you don’t need to worry about this case for now.Let’s move on!Next lesson4.3Object sizes and the sizeof operatorBack to table of contentsPrevious lesson4.1Introduction to fundamental data types
